project_setup.description: Recommendations that should be surfaced when setting up or initializing a new coding project.

always.reason: Beads should always be used for any complex project to track issues, tasks, and dependencies. It provides structured, dependency-aware task management purpose-built for AI-assisted workflows. Run `bd init` in the project root and `bd setup claude` to wire up Claude Code hooks.
always.when: Any project with multiple tasks, features, or bugs to track. If the project is non-trivial, use beads.

conditional.reason: Unity projects should have the CoPlay MCP server configured for direct editor integration.
Projects using Firebase should have the Firebase MCP server configured.
Web projects should set up a .claude/launch.json for dev server previews.
